overall.description: A bus simulator game showing first-person perspective from the driver's cabin during heavy rainfall. The bus navigates urban streets with active windshield wipers, stopping at traffic lights and intersections while passing mixed residential and commercial buildings. The synthetic graphics and dashboard instrumentation confirm this is game engine footage.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with tram tracks

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, bus begins moving forward
passing through first intersection into continuous urban street

agents.ego_description: operating the bus in heavy rain, stopped at red light then accelerating through the intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead, maintaining distance from the bus

entered.detail: driver's control panel with steering wheel, speedometer, and digital displays
navigation display showing route map on the right side of dashboard
wipers moving back and forth clearing heavy rain from front glass
rain droplets covering the front and side windows
white sedan vehicle traveling in the same lane ahead of the bus
overhead traffic signal changing from red to green
multi-story residential buildings lining the left side of the street
mixed-use buildings with storefronts on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens from the bus driver's perspective with heavy rain obscuring the windshield. The bus is stopped at a red traffic light on a multi-lane urban road with apartment buildings on both sides. Around 7 seconds, the light turns green and the bus accelerates forward, passing through the intersection while following a white sedan. Windshield wipers maintain constant motion throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with tram tracks and mixed buildings

events.description: tram tracks become visible on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed along the straight urban road, navigating light traffic

notable_agents.action: white van driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: metal railway tracks embedded in the road surface on the left side
tall lampposts lining the center of the road

segments.scene_description: The bus continues driving straight along an urban street with tram tracks now visible on the left. The surroundings feature mixed apartment and commercial buildings. A white van travels ahead in the same lane. The rain continues steadily with wipers operating, and the road stretches forward with street lights visible in the distance.

events.description: bus stops behind white car at red traffic light
bus turns right at the intersection following the traffic flow

agents.ego_description: stopped at traffic light behind other vehicles, then executing a right turn at the intersection

notable_agents.action: white car stopped at the red light directly ahead of the bus
large truck moving through the intersection ahead

entered.detail: large commercial truck with illuminated brake lights moving through traffic
traffic regulation signs mounted on poles along the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The bus encounters heavy traffic and stops behind a white car at a red light. Commercial buildings line the right side with visible road signs. After waiting, the bus proceeds through the intersection around 30 seconds, following a large truck, and executes a right turn at 33 seconds onto a new street.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with parked cars and bus stops

events.description: road changes to street with parked cars lining the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising along the street passing parked vehicles and approaching bus stops

entered.detail: row of parked vehicles including red and white cars along the right curb
covered waiting area with glass panels for bus passengers
metal barrier separating the road from tram tracks on the left

segments.scene_description: After turning, the bus travels along a street characterized by parked cars lining the right side and a metal fence protecting tram tracks on the left. The buildings transition to residential style. The bus passes a bus stop shelter on the right while maintaining steady progress through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop terminal with tram station

events.description: bus approaches and stops at designated bus stop behind a taxi

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a complete stop at the bus stop to pick up passengers

notable_agents.action: taxi stopped at the bus stop with brake lights illuminated, waiting in front of the bus

entered.detail: yellow taxi cab stopped at the bus stop with illuminated brake lights
passenger platform for tram service visible across the street on the left
people standing under the bus stop shelter waiting to board

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches its destination, slowing down as it nears a bus stop shelter where passengers are waiting. A taxi is stopped ahead at the same stop. To the left, a tram station platform is visible. The bus comes to a complete stop behind the taxi at the designated bus stop, concluding the journey segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus cabin as it navigates a rain-slicked urban environment, moving from a busy multi-lane intersection toward a quiet residential bus stop. It begins stopped at a red light amidst towering apartment buildings, accelerating forward through the heavy rain as the light turns green to follow a white sedan. As the bus continues straight, the scenery shifts to a mix of commercial buildings and tram tracks, eventually slowing to a halt behind a white car at another intersection before executing a right turn. The environment then transitions into a residential area characterized by parked cars and metal fences, passing a bus stop shelter under the steady rhythm of the windshield wipers. Finally, the bus slows its progress as it approaches a tram station platform, coming to a complete stop behind a taxi at a designated stop where passengers are waiting.
